beacon_effects.title: Activate a full Beacon pyramid with a secondary effect — the Nether Star's endgame use

subtitle.text: One guaranteed per Wither. The Beacon is the intended use. The Ch10 crafting recipes are the other use.

description: CH.10 · THE NETHER STAR
▸ The Wither drops one Nether Star.
The Beacon requires one Nether Star.
This is the primary intended use.
The secondary uses are in Ch12+ crafting chains.
Farm multiple Withers before Ch12.
The spawn rate is intentional.
◈ BEACON PYRAMID TIERS
└ Tier 1: 9 blocks (3×3) — one primary effect
Speed I / Haste I / Resistance I / Jump Boost I
└ Tier 2: 34 blocks (5×5 + 9) — secondary effect
└ Tier 3: 83 blocks (7×7 + 5×5 + 9) — Strength II
└ Tier 4: 164 blocks — max, all secondaries unlocked
└ Materials: iron, gold, diamond, or netherite blocks
└ Radius: 20-50 blocks depending on tier
◈ BEACON PRIORITY EFFECTS
└ ✦ Haste II (Tier 4): breaks stone instantly
with Efficiency V diamond — essential for mining
└ ✦ Resistance I (Tier 1): significant damage reduction
active while building in combat zones
└ ✦ Regeneration I (secondary): passive healing
pairs with Lifesteal for PvP builds
└ ✦ Strength II (Tier 4): doubles melee damage
boss fight prep — activate before entering
◈ PYRAMID MATERIAL NOTE
Use iron blocks (cheapest) unless aesthetics matter
└ Mixed blocks work: each layer can be a different
valid material
└ Build pyramid UNDER ground level to protect it
(surface beacons can be destroyed by explosions)
◈ NETHER STAR OTHER USES
└ Some Ch12+ recipes require Nether Star
(check JEI after Last Watch scroll research)
└ Farm 3+ Withers before Ch12 begins
└ Wither Reincarnated: same guaranteed drop,
harder fight — plan accordingly
▸ The Nether Star does not come from the Nether.
It comes from what the Wither does to things.
Condensed destruction, crystallized.
The civilizations thought it was divine.
They were not entirely wrong.
▶ Activate a full Beacon with secondary effect [check]
▶ Hold a Nether Star
◇ Haste II + Efficiency V + Aqua Affinity in a
Beacon radius = no mining friction anywhere.
This is the endgame base upgrade that changes
how resource gathering feels.
